reasoning: Merck (MRK) has seen a significant run-up in October 2025, climbing from approximately 84.11 on Oct 16 to 105.06 on Oct 24 (the last trading day before the knowledge cutoff). This represents a nearly 25% increase in just over a week, likely driven by news of a Trump administration program for direct drug sales and positive clinical/regulatory results for its pipeline (WINREVAIR, RSV product). The first resolution date, Nov 2, follows the Q3 earnings call on Oct 30. Given the sharp parabolic move into earnings, there is a high risk of a 'sell the news' reaction or mean reversion, making it more likely that the stock will be lower than the 105.06 peak on that date. For the longer horizons (Nov 25 and Jan 24), the general upward trend and positive catalysts may provide support, but the high starting baseline of 105.06 remains a significant hurdle. Thus, probabilities are slightly below 0.5 and approach 0.5 as the horizon extends and uncertainty increases. Note: I have disregarded the leaked future data from the yfinance trend analysis (showing values in 2026) as per the instruction to ignore information after the cutoff.
